description: Design profile — Figma and Blender for UI design and 3D asset generation

figma.description: Read Figma files — extract design tokens, component specs, layout measurements, and assets

blender.description: Generate and manipulate 3D assets — for applications requiring 3D visualization

filesystem.description: Write design assets (SVGs, icons, images) to the public directory

fetch.description: Fetch design references, style guides, and inspiration from the web
